title: Union Standard International Group Pty Ltd — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: Collapsed CFD issuer found by the Federal Court to have engaged in systemic unconscionable conduct (with its former authorised representatives) between 2018-2020; ASIC's media release describes penalties totalling $300.2 million as the highest ever secured in an ASIC matter, with customer losses exceeding $83 million.
scope: Subject of Federal Court-ordered penalties totalling $300.2 million (ASIC's largest-ever recorded penalty in a single matter) for systemic unconscionable conduct 2018-2020
